title: Head of Integrated Marketing Campaigns (IMC) – Southeast Asia
description:
About the Role

The Regional IMC Leader is a non-executional, strategic leadership role responsible for setting campaign direction, governance models, and operating frameworks for all SEA markets.

Based in Singapore, this role leads the SEA IMC leadership layer, with six country IMC Leads reporting in, and partners closely with senior regional stakeholders across Commercial, Creator, Product, and Ops to drive step-change growth through campaigns.

Key Responsibilities

1. Regional Campaign Strategy & Direction

  • Define the regional campaign vision, strategy, and governance for major TikTok Shop SEA campaigns (e.g. Mega Sale Days, Category Months, Strategic Business Pushes), with execution owned by local market teams.
  • Translate regional and country-level business priorities (GMV, category growth, merchant activation, creator adoption) into clear campaign objectives, themes, and value propositions that scale across markets.
  • Define campaign scope, success metrics, operating principles, and prioritization guidelines for country teams.

2. Regional Alignment & Decision-Making

  • Act as the regional alignment and decision authority, coordinating across:Category & Commercial teamsMerchant Acquisition & OpsCreator / Affiliate teamsMarketing channels (in-app, CRM, paid, social, creator)Product, Ops, and Regional stakeholders
  • Ensure alignment on priorities, messaging, success metrics, and execution standards, while avoiding direct execution ownership.
  • Make regional trade-off decisions to protect overall SEA outcomes.

3. Channel Strategy & Frameworks (Non-Executional)

  • Set regional channel strategy, integration frameworks, and best practices across all relevant touchpoints:In-app traffic and placementsCreator and live commerce activationsAffiliate and KOL programsMerchant enablement and toolkits
  • Ensure a consistent narrative, user journey, and measurement logic across channels, with optimization led by country teams.

4. Performance Governance & Insights

  • Define regional, business-linked KPIs and success definitions (e.g. GMV uplift, participation rate, traffic mix, creator contribution, conversion).
  • Review performance with country teams, surface risks and opportunities, and guide strategic pivots at a regional level.
  • Lead structured post-mortems, extracting insights and translating them into actionable improvements for future campaigns.

5. Regional Leadership & Capability Building

  • Lead, coach, and develop the SEA IMC leadership team, with direct management of country IMC Leads and accountability for campaign direction, quality, and consistency across all SEA markets.
  • Build strong regional campaign playbooks, operating rhythms, and governance mechanisms that raise execution quality, speed, and consistency across markets.
  • Foster a culture of high standards, speed, and accountability.

6. Regional Stakeholder Leadership

  • Partner closely with Regional Leadership, Country Managers, and Functional Heads to balance regional consistency with local market flexibility.
  • Provide clear upward communication on campaign performance, risks, and strategic recommendations.

Success Metrics

  • Consistent GMV uplift and campaign contribution across SEA markets
  • Adoption of regional IMC frameworks and playbooks by all countries
  • Improved campaign ROI / efficiency metrics at regional level
  • Clear differentiation and maturity of country campaign execution quality
  • Strength and stability of SEA IMC leadership bench

Requirements

Minimum Requirements

  • 8+ years of total relevant experience, with at least 6 years in platform, e-commerce, or consumer internet businesses operating at regional or multi-country scale.
  • 6+ years owning regional or SEA-level campaign strategy, covering at least 6 SEA markets as a regional leder.
  • Track record of improving campaign ROI / efficiency metrics year-on-year at regional scale (e.g. ROAS improvement, cost-to-GMV reduction, or traffic efficiency gains). Delivering multi-billion USD annual GMV or ≥20% annual GMV contribution at platform or regional level.

Preferred Requirements

  • Direct ownership or governance of platform-level mega campaigns (e.g. double-day, payday, flagship moments).
  • Hands-on leadership exposure to creator-led commerce, affiliate ecosystems, or content-driven monetization
  • Demonstrated management or governance of organizations with more than 150 total headcount across multiple countries.

postedCompany.description:
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. Our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok has global offices including Los Angeles, New York, London, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Singapore, Jakarta, Seoul and Tokyo.


TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.
postedCompany.name: TIKTOK PTE. LTD.
